name: Gingered Sole Fillets
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe sole fillets and place on foil-lined broiler pan.
2. Preheat the broiler.
3. Place egg yolk, lemon juice, dry mustard, oyster sauce, sesame oil, grated fresh ginger, and olive oil in a food processor or blender.
4. Process for 20 seconds.
5. Gradually pour in olive oil while processing all the time.
6. Continue processing for an additional 30 seconds until well combined and slightly thickened.
7. Spread the mixture evenly over the sole fillets.
8. Broil just until the fish is opaque, about 4 inches from the heat source. The top of the fillets will darken as the sauce caramelizes.
9. Serve with chopped green onions on top of the fillets. Makes 4 servings.
